action.reasoning: Observation: The previous iteration used Mixup and CutMix with GCE loss, which resulted in a slight drop in accuracy (0.7808 vs 0.7838). Analysis: Mixup creates soft labels, which mathematically alters the behavior of the GCE loss and can reduce its effectiveness against label noise. To properly handle the noise, I will remove Mixup/CutMix, keep the EMA model (which helps with stability), and increase the GCE 'q' parameter to 0.8 for stronger noise robustness. I will train for 10 epochs. Decision: Rewrite train.py to remove Mixup, set q=0.8, and train for 10 epochs, then evaluate.
